ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_link" TEXT /* Link to the detailed game report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Coach, Analyst, Fan) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C)
Date of birth of the player
Round in which the player was drafted
Foreign key linking to the team the player belongs to
Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West)
Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific)
Foreign key linking to the home team
Foreign key linking to the away team
Link to the detailed game report
Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Coach, Analyst, Fan)
Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role
Foreign key linking to the user's role
